cells.xml_text_content: Making errors in medicine is inevitable.
cells.xml_raw_text_content: Making errors in medicine is inevitable.
cells.pdf_text_content: Making errors in medicine is inevitable.

cells.xml_text_content: There is a gap between what physicians know as “best care” and what is being provided on a day-to-day basis
cells.xml_raw_text_content: There is a gap between what physicians know as “best care” and what is being provided on a day-to-day basis
cells.pdf_text_content: There is a gap between what physicians know as “best care” and what is being provided on a day-to-day basis

cells.xml_text_content: Competent physicians do not make medical errors that lead to patient harm
cells.xml_raw_text_content: Competent physicians do not make medical errors that lead to patient harm
cells.pdf_text_content: Competent physicians do not make medical errors that lead to patient harm

cells.xml_text_content: Most errors are due to things that physicians cannot do anything about
cells.xml_raw_text_content: Most errors are due to things that physicians cannot do anything about
cells.pdf_text_content: Most errors are due to things that physicians cannot do anything about

cells.xml_text_content: If I saw a medical error, I would keep it to myself
cells.xml_raw_text_content: If I saw a medical error, I would keep it to myself
cells.pdf_text_content: If I saw a medical error, I would keep it to myself

cells.xml_text_content: If there is no harm to a patient, there is no need to address an error
cells.xml_raw_text_content: If there is no harm to a patient, there is no need to address an error
cells.pdf_text_content: If there is no harm to a patient, there is no need to address an error

cells.xml_text_content: Only physicians can determine the causes of a medical error
cells.xml_raw_text_content: Only physicians can determine the causes of a medical error
cells.pdf_text_content: Only physicians can determine the causes of a medical error

cells.xml_text_content: Reporting systems do little to reduce future errors
cells.xml_raw_text_content: Reporting systems do little to reduce future errors
cells.pdf_text_content: Reporting systems do little to reduce future errors

cells.xml_text_content: After an error occurs, an effective strategy is to work harder and to be more careful
cells.xml_raw_text_content: After an error occurs, an effective strategy is to work harder and to be more careful
cells.pdf_text_content: After an error occurs, an effective strategy is to work harder and to be more careful

cells.xml_text_content: Physicians should not tolerate uncertainty in patient care
cells.xml_raw_text_content: Physicians should not tolerate uncertainty in patient care
cells.pdf_text_content: Physicians should not tolerate uncertainty in patient care

cells.xml_text_content: The culture of medicine makes it easy for providers to deal constructively with errors
cells.xml_raw_text_content: The culture of medicine makes it easy for providers to deal constructively with errors
cells.pdf_text_content: The culture of medicine makes it easy for providers to deal constructively with errors
